name: Apache InLong
description: One-stop data streaming and ingestion platform originated at Tencent; Apache TLP.

seo.title: Apache InLong — Data Integration / ETL / Reverse ETL
seo.meta_description: Apache InLong: One-stop data streaming and ingestion platform originated at Tencent; Apache TLP.

when_to_use: One-stop ingestion from data sources to Kafka and data lakes
High-throughput streaming data integration from WeChat-scale apps
CDC pipelines feeding Apache Flink stream processing jobs
Replacing custom Kafka producers with managed connector agents
Tencent-proven data ingestion for large-scale analytics platforms

pros: Unified ingestion for streaming and batch sources
Battle-tested at Tencent scale before Apache
Handles Kafka, Pulsar, TubeMQ as backbone
cons: Steep operational complexity for small teams
English documentation is still catching up
Narrower connector set than commercial rivals
review.verdict: Powerful platform if you need Tencent-scale ingestion, overkill for typical data pipelines.
review.best_for: Large platform teams consolidating streaming and batch ingestion
review.not_for: Small teams who just need a few Kafka-to-warehouse pipelines
